rationale: Candidate ac40b60e7f368d1bfce7ee94698c3f28d6120af7 is superior in its natural flow and technical terminology. It correctly uses standard Hebrew technical terms (like 'מרווח' for interval) and maintains a professional yet direct tone. Both preserved the MDX structure perfectly.
